texto: We should tell our kids to just have fun, participate and not get bent on winning or losing. But every coach, when they say that, they say it tongue in cheek, 'Don't worry about winning': If you win I'll get you ice cream, but if you lose I'm going to pout in the car.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Bode Miller sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “We should tell our kids to just have fun, participate and not get bent on winning or losing. But …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, winning, fun, útil em momentos de fun e losing.

frase_original: We should tell our kids to just have fun, participate and not get bent on winning or losing. But every coach, when they say that, they say it tongue in cheek, 'Don't worry about winning': If you win I'll get you ice cream, but if you lose I'm going to pout in the car.
